text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Today, Agnes Digital is running in a scrimmage.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's progressing slowly, with Agnes Digital buried
right in the middle of the pack.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Everyone is still grouped up as they round the
fourth corner! Ohhh, what's this?! Agnes Digital
has broken free!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
choice_data_list: Good job breaking out of the pack.
Good job breaking out of the pack.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Right?! I felt like I could really go for it today, so
I did!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Normally, I freeze up at the thought of
accidentally touching one of the other runners...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But I was in total control today. I felt like I could
get through any gap.
choice_data_list: You were smooth and stable out there!
You were smooth and stable out there!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I figure it's because of all the muscle I've put on!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Which is thanks to you! Now it feels so good to
run!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I can run with other Umamusume without holding
back, but also without bothering them!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Pretty soon, I won't be fazed by anything so long
as I've got your trusty support!
